reviews.comment:
Es muy pequeño y muy mal ubicado, sus accesos son difíciles y suelen estar obstruidos por el tránsito, sobre todo en verano. No lo elegiría para realizar una carga rápida de combustible en caso de apuro.

(Translated by Google)
It's very small and poorly located, access is difficult and often obstructed by traffic, especially in summer. I wouldn't choose it for a quick fuel fill-up in an emergency.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJbnFfVk9REAE

reviews.comment:
Exelente atención en la playa de combustibles. Sanitarios en buen estado.El bar muy luminoso, surtido y buen servicio.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service at the fuel yard. Restrooms in good condition. The bar is very bright, well-stocked, and has good service.

reviews.comment:
Buena Atencion
Es recomendable cargar nafta apenas uno arriba a ña falda porque eferiados largos se llena de gente.
Tambien ir en horarios no.picos

(Translated by Google)
Good service
It's recommended to fill up with gas as soon as you arrive at the slopes because it gets very crowded on long holidays.
Also, go during off-peak hours.
